Short Description:
Computer St. Louis is an IT solutions provider equipped with a wide range of products and services including, but not limited to: cloud computing, managed IT services, and VoIP systems. Our team consists of certified network engineers and technicians experienced in troubleshooting the accounts of small to mid-sized businesses with IT complexity. Combined with our strategic partnerships and backed by our well-educated consultants, Computer St. Louis has the right tools to competently evaluate all of your organization's IT needs.

Computer St. Louis is proud to be locally owned and operated for over 25 years. Computer St. Louis' goal is to serve all our clients with the right technology to make them more profitable, more efficient, more productive, and simply, to make their jobs and lives easier.

Computer St. Louis delivers proactive maintenance services through our flat-rate IT Support Service designed to reduce your costs, increase your profits, and mitigate your business risks. We partner with you as your Virtual CIO and IT Department to allow you to focus on running your business, not your technology.

Our relationship begins with evaluating your current state of technology, including infrastructure, hardware, line-of-business applications, and vendors. We work with you to identify your critical business processes, pain points, and vulnerabilities. Finally, we perform a threat analysis to determine your business risks. Completing this process allows us to design a Technology Plan aligning with your long-term business goals.

Computer St. Louis becomes a true partner as an extension of your business. Because our Service Plan is based on a flat monthly fee, allowing you to budget your IT costs annually, we assume both financial and technical risks in our relationship, fueling our commitment to identify and deliver solutions, reduce downtime, and ultimately, improve your company's efficiency.

For more information, please call (314) 821-3237.

Are persistent IT issues slowing your business down? You're not alone. 

Outdated systems, security risks, slow performance, network disruptions – these are just a few of the very common problems that many businesses are dealing with. But more than just being extremely annoying, these problems also cost a lot of time, money, and productivity.

Short Description:
There's a lot that goes into successfully managing high-performance cloud servers. 
	
At DataYard, we start with your applications and use cases. From there we predict traffic patterns and loads, and architect services we'll need to carry the weight. We break the design down functionally, deploy the nodes, bring everything together with network connectivity, and secure the layers of the delivery stack. 
	
And then we test, test, test. We TTHOOI ("Test The Hell Out Of It"). We use penetration tests to find and close security holes. Then we throw lots of traffic at the system. We actually *try* to break it. We make certain the system we built for you will work when we hand you the keys.
	
The people who do this work well rarely get any recognition. It's the online launch failures who get the most attention. If it's alright with you... we prefer to go unnoticed.
	
Visit our site to learn more about how we can help you rise above: https://www.datayard.us

Short Description:
Synergy Associates is an authorized stocking distributor focused on enterprise IT solutions from HPE, Dell Technologies, and Aruba Networking. Founded in 1998 and headquartered in Minneapolis, Minnesota, the company serves clients across the Americas and Caribbean. With over two decades of experience, Synergy Associates partners with resellers, integrators, managed service providers, value-added resellers, and public sector buyers.

The company offers a range of services, including Configure-to-Order systems for HPE ProLiant and Dell PowerEdge servers, rapid quoting, and inventory management. Synergy maintains a stocked inventory with a focus on modern solutions, ensuring quick delivery and support. Their product portfolio includes new and refurbished HPE ProLiant servers, Dell recertified PowerEdge servers, and genuine HPE Aruba networking equipment, all at competitive prices.

Synergy Associates has received multiple accolades, including the "Most Valuable Partner" title from HPE, highlighting its commitment to quality and customer service.
